mapper.select: SELECT b.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar AS avatar, SUM(IF(b.type = 'expense', b.amount, 0)) AS expense, SUM(IF(b.type = 'income', b.amount, 0)) AS income, IFNULL(fm.is_owner, 0) AS isOwner FROM t_bill b LEFT JOIN t_user u ON b.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_family_member fm ON b.user_id = fm.user_id AND fm.family_id = #{familyId} WHERE b.family_id = #{familyId} AND b.time >= #{startTime} AND b.time <= #{endTime} AND b.deleted = 0 GROUP BY b.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, fm.is_owner ORDER BY expense DESC
